report_text:
--- CAPABILITIES (CAPA) ---

  - set file attributes

  - get file size
  - parse PE header
  - check OS version

  - query environment variable
  - write process memory
  - get socket information
  - get local IPv4 addresses
  - bypass Mark of the Web
  - delete service

  - persist via Run registry key
  - accept command line arguments

  - get disk information

  - get socket status

  - enumerate processes

  - reference the VMWare IO port

  - Data::Encode Data::XOR [C0026.002]
  - Anti-Static Analysis::Executable Code Obfuscation::Argument Obfuscation [B0032.020]
  - Anti-Static Analysis::Executable Code Obfuscation::Stack Strings [B0032.017]
  - Operating System::Registry::Create Registry Key [C0036.004]

  - access PEB ldr_data
  - Process::Resume Thread [C0054]
  - File System::Set File Attributes [C0050]

--- FILE IDENTITY ---

PE IMPORTS (DANGEROUS):
  KERNEL32.dll: CreateProcessW, CreateRemoteThread, GetProcAddress, LoadLibraryW, VirtualAlloc, VirtualAllocEx, VirtualProtect, WinExec, WriteProcessMemory
  ADVAPI32.dll: AdjustTokenPrivileges, OpenProcessToken

COMPILER AND PACKER:

  [Linker] Microsoft Linker
  [Tool] Visual Studio

PE SECTIONS (entropy):
  .text        entropy=6.54
  .rdata       entropy=5.09
  .data        entropy=0.59
  .reloc       entropy=5.88
  .reloc       entropy=7.87
